'''Vulta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Atreyis system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Vultan]] [[Species/Legends|species]], as well as [[Greff-Timms Industrial/Legends|Greff-Timms Industrial]] and [[Oss Wilum]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Deceived (audiobook)}} {{1st}}
